column3: The obstacle in the path becomes the path. Never forget this.

column4: do not do it. If it is not true

column4: the whole universe surrenders.

column3: A wise person knows what they can control and what they cannot.

column3: Difficulties strengthen the mind

column3: Never esteem anything as of advantage to you that will make you break your word.

column4: and change is nature's delight.

column3: Very little is needed to make a happy life. It is all within yourself

column3: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.

column4: I will gladly change.

column3: The only way to deal with an unfree world is to become so absolutely free that your very existence is an act of rebellion.

column4: the smaller we appear to those who cannot fly.

column4: insanity is rare. But in groups and nations

column3: That which can be destroyed by the truth should be.

column4: but some of us are looking at the stars.

column3: The only difference between a caprice and a lifelong passion is that the caprice lasts a little longer.

column4: the moon

column3: No one saves us but ourselves. No one can and no one may. We ourselves must walk the path.

column4: and the life of the candle will not be shortened.

column3: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.

column4: only three things matter: how much you loved
column6: and how gracefully you let go.

column3: Holding onto anger is like drinking poison and expecting the other person to die.

column4: it will also brighten your own path.

column3: Knowing others is wisdom. Knowing yourself is enlightenment.

column3: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

column3: Life is a series of natural and spontaneous changes. Don't resist them.

column4: the whole world surrenders.

column3: Simplicity
column4: patience
column5: compassion. These three are your greatest treasures.

column3: Silence is a source of great strength.

column4: yet everything is accomplished.

column3: Act without expectation.

column3: To lead people

column3: An unexamined life is not worth living.

column4: you'll become happy. If you get a bad one

column3: Man is not disturbed by events but by his interpretation of events.

column4: but rejoices for those which he has.

column3: It is impossible for a person to learn what they think they already know.

column4: but by our thoughts about what happens.

column3: Seek not that the things which happen should happen as you wish
column4: but wish the things which happen to be as they are.

column3: Men are disturbed not by the things that happen but by the opinions about the things.

column4: and then speak.

column3: Wealth consists not in having great possessions

column3: He who laughs at himself never runs out of things to laugh at.

column4: whose presence calls forth your best.

column3: No great thing is created suddenly

column3: It's not what happens to you but how you react that matters.

column4: but we can always choose how we respond to them.

column3: The good life is one inspired by love and guided by knowledge.

column4: but know not what we may be.

column3: The mind grows by what it feeds on.
